summary: A Go-based CLI tool that orchestrates schema validation, detection, and assertion running with plugin support.
concerns: uncommitted changes (3 modified, 1 staged, 4 untracked) indicate instability
recent commits are dominated by automated agent session archival rather than feature work
examples/kubernetes suggests potential complexity in deployment not reflected in core code
suggestions: commit or stash the working tree changes to establish a clean baseline
clarify the relationship between the detector, runner, and reporter modules
document the plugin interface and expected schema format
